description: Employee Details module — list, search, filter, sort, pagination, edit drawer
businessRules: Current tab shows only active employees; Past tab shows only archived/deallocated — never mix
Search, filter, sort, and pagination state are INDEPENDENT per tab; tab switch must not carry state
Last Updated must come from API only — any frontend computation is a defect
All grid values must exactly match the corresponding API response
After Edit Drawer save, grid must reflect changes immediately without page reload
Cancel on Edit Drawer must discard all changes; grid shows original pre-edit values
Reset on Basic Filters clears all criteria and restores unfiltered list for current tab only
Employee count in grid rows, result-count badge, and API total must always match
Advanced Filters: Save applies all; Cancel reverts to last-applied state
edgeCases: Null Reporting Manager — cell renders gracefully, no JS crash
Null Skills — Skills cell renders without +N chip
Null Department / Null Projects — graceful fallback display
Single search result — grid shows '1 of 1', pagination controls disabled
Zero results — empty-state message shown, count badge = 0
Large dataset (500+ records) — all perf targets met, pagination accurate
API 500 error — user-friendly error displayed, no JS crash
XSS in search input — escaped rendering, no script execution
Special characters in search (hyphens, apostrophes, accents, Unicode) — correct matching
Pagination boundary — add/archive employee while on last page, no duplicates or missing records
Advanced filter: Available Since end < start — validation error shown
Advanced filter: Availability % = 101 or Experience = -1 — rejected
Tab switch with active search — search does NOT persist to other tab
Double-click Save in Edit Drawer — no duplicate update, no record corruption
Feature flag disabled mid-session — graceful handling, no crash
regressionAreas: Employee count mismatch (grid rows ≠ badge ≠ API total)
Edit button missing on hover for some rows after CRUD
Edited employee disappears from grid after save
Filter chips not cleared after Reset; partial filter state remains
Duplicate employee IDs appear across paginated pages
API/UI value mismatch (especially Allocation % and Log Hours)
Feature flag controls not hidden for non-admin roles
Sort order lost after applying a filter
Pagination counter wrong after search/filter combination
historicalBugs: Employee count mismatch between grid, badge, and API
Edit button visibility — missing for some rows
API count mismatch after filter + pagination
Allocation sync issues — stale Allocation % shown
Feature flag visibility leaking to non-admin roles

knownFailure.title: Open edit drawer @smoke
knownFailure.error: TimeoutError: locator('table') not found within 20 000 ms
knownFailure.hint: Employee list table uses a non-table container — verify selector; try role=grid or data-testid before 'table'
